title: Hextrogen
description: Tiny little Hexcasting addon that interoperates with Create: Estrogen to add a dash spell and a replenish dash spell
body:
A very small Hexcasting addon that works with Create: Estrogen.
- adds Dash - a spell that takes a directional vector and makes you dash in that direction
- adds Overdrive - a spell that replenishes all your dashes even midair for one charged amethyst
